company: WK Kellogg Co (formerly Kellogg Company - cereal business post-2023 split)

mentions.note: Post-split (Oct 2, 2023) with Kellanova: WK started at $13.80, dropped to $13.35 day-one, ~$1.1B market cap; Ferrero bought at $23/share (~$3.1B) in 2024; up 72% from first-day close in ~2 years despite GLP-1 headwinds; breakup strategy worked.
